faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Our Fintech banking service revolutionizes the way you manage your money, offering seamless, secure, and smart solutions for all your financial needs
faq.source_name: Central Bank of the Republic of Uzbekistan

questions.title: My credit application was rejected. When can I reapply?
questions.content: You can reapply after 30 days once you are sure that the minimum requirements have been met

questions.title: What are the minimum requirements for obtaining a loan?
questions.content:
- Citizenship of the Republic of Uzbekistan 
 - Possession of a permanent official income 
 - Positive credit history (if available) 
 - No outstanding debts on other loans 
 - No outstanding debts in the Bureau of Compulsory Enforcement (MIB)

questions.title: How can I find my credit history?
questions.content: You can obtain information from the Credit Bureau, which collects credit history data, once a year for free. You can learn more about the Bureau's services on the KATM website via the link www.infokredit.uz

questions.title: What salary amount should I indicate?
questions.content: Sometimes the requested amount may be too large. Even if the loan term is extended and the payment is reduced to a minimum, the payment may still exceed your income. In such cases, the bank will approve a smaller amount or reject the loan. Indicate a loan amount where the monthly payment does not exceed your income. If you have additional income that you can verify, it will definitely be taken into account
